'''Vincent Gatharard''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. 

==Biography==
He was born on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and raised in a military academy. He enjoyed the power that his status as an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] gave him over his subordinates, and his ambition was to return to the academy where he grew up to become an instructor.<ref name="Enemies for Life" />

A man of many talents, he was skilled at operation of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles, [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]], and [[Gunner/Legends|gunnery]], and was also a good leader with a keen investigative mind, and in addition he had insights into the procedures of Imperial bureaucracy.<ref name="Enemies for Life" />

He was dispatched to the [[mercenary's convention]] in [[Echnos City]] to delegate jobs and contracts. Here he realized that some of the individuals that the Empire had [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] on were actually present at the meeting, which resulted in a dramatic chase through the [[City/Legends|city]].<ref name="Enemies for Life" />
